items.claim: Dioni Barbosza has a massive skill gap on the ground compared to her opponent.
items.quote: There is a massive skill gap on the ground.

items.claim: Felipe Franco has the ability to wrestle.
items.quote: Felipe can actually wrestle a little bit.

items.claim: Austin Bashy will immediately start wrestling in his fight against Jose Delgado.
items.quote: I think Austin's going to immediately start wrestling.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman's knees are a physical concern.
items.quote: The question is, does he have the knees? I don't think so.

items.claim: Dricus du Plessis is physically stronger than Kamaru Usman.
items.quote: I certainly think he is more physical. I certainly think he's going to be physically stronger

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is 42 years old and showing signs of decline in speed and durability.
items.quote: he is 42 years old and we are starting to see it. Now, he's not completely death gas falling over, but what he is is a little bit slower. What he is is not as durable as he used to be.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is a better grappler than his upcoming opponent.
items.quote: I think he is the much better grappler.
I think his striking is underrated.

items.claim: Oklahoma judges have an old-school mentality where a takedown wins the round.
items.quote: we might get some judges that still look at the old school mentality of things and oh, a takedown wins the round.
